scripts.pkg:win11: npm run build && pkg dist/index.js --targets node18-win-x64 --output ../bin/win11/cmake2ide.exe
scripts.pkg:linux: npm run build && pkg dist/index.js --targets node18-linux-x64 --output ../bin/linux/cmake2ide
scripts.pkg:macos: npm run build && pkg dist/index.js --targets node18-macos-x64 --output ../bin/macos/cmake2ide
scripts.pkg:all: npm run pkg:win11 && npm run pkg:linux && npm run pkg:macos
